name: Lemon Almond Madeleines
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Brush the madeleine molds well with some of the clarified butter.
2. In a food processor, grind almonds and sugar to a very fine texture.
3. Cream softened butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Add almond mixture, beating after each addition.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add lemon rind.
5. Sift flour, baking powder and salt into a separate bowl. Alternately mix in lemon juice with the batter, beginning and ending with flour mixture, blending well after each addition.
6. Spoon batter evenly into prepared madeleine molds using an offset spatula. Tap to release air bubbles.
7. Place filled molds on a baking sheet. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden at edges.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on racks.
9. Repeat with remaining batter.
10. Dust cooled madeleines with confectioners' sugar before serving.
Yield: about 2 dozen madeleines
